ServerTooltipInactive: The local OCR server has not been started yet. It will launch automatically on first extraction requiring local OCR.
ServerTooltipStarting: The local OCR server is starting…
ServerTooltipActive: The local OCR server is active and ready to process files.
ServerTooltipStopped: The local OCR server has stopped. Use 'Restart server' to retry.
ServerStartingFailed: The OCR server could not start. Check the application logs.
ServerDiedDescription: The local server stopped unexpectedly. You can try to restart it.
ServerDiedRestartTooltip: Attempt to restart the local OCR server
ControlDropTooltip: You can also drag and drop a folder here
EmptyResultsDesc: Select a folder and start extraction
SummaryBannerComplete: Extraction complete — {0} succeeded, {1} incomplete, {2} errors. Review results before exporting.
BtnRerunErrorsTooltip: Re-run extraction only for errored files
GeminiDescription: For better extraction accuracy, you can configure a free Gemini API key. Without a key, local OCR extraction remains fully available.
GeminiClearConfirm: Clear Gemini API key? Extraction will use local OCR by default.
GeminiEnterKey: Please enter a key or click Skip.
GeminiNoInternet: No internet connection. Cannot verify key.
GeminiError401: API key not recognized (401). Check that you copied the full key.
GeminiError403: API key denied (403). Access to Gemini may be disabled.
GeminiTimeout: Verification request timed out. Check your internet connection.
GeminiParseError: Failed to parse JSON returned by Gemini
GeminiExtractionText:
Extract invoice information as JSON only.
Keys must be exactly: numero_facture, date, fournisseur, client, montant_ht, montant_tva, montant_taxe, montant_ttc.
Use null if information is missing. Never guess.
Reply with JSON only.
GrokDescription: Configure a Grok (xAI) API key for cloud-based extraction. Grok offers an alternative to Gemini with competitive accuracy.
GrokClearConfirm: Clear Grok API key? Extraction will use local OCR by default.
GrokEnterKey: Please enter a Grok API key or click Skip.
GrokKeyEmpty: The Grok API key is empty.
GrokNoInternet: No internet connection. Cannot verify Grok key.
GrokError401: API key not recognized (401). Check that you copied the full key.
GrokError403: API key denied (403). Access to xAI may be disabled.
GrokTimeout: Verification request timed out. Check your internet connection.
GrokParseError: Failed to parse JSON returned by xAI
GrokExtractionText:
Extract invoice information from this image as JSON only.
Keys must be exactly: numero_facture, date, fournisseur, client, montant_ht, montant_tva, montant_taxe, montant_ttc.
Use null if information is missing. Never guess.
Reply with JSON only.
ErrorPythonNotFound: Python environment not found. Please re-run the installer.
ErrorServerNotFound: OCR server not found. Please re-run the installer.
ErrorOcrPoppler: Poppler missing — PDF not supported (see README)
AboutMessage:
HOTIX — Invoice Extraction

Version 1.0.0

Engines: PaddleOCR (local), Gemini Vision (cloud)
ExportDescription: How would you like to export the extracted invoice data?
ExportNewDesc: Export to a brand new Excel file
ExportAppendDesc: Add data to an existing workbook
ExportSheetPickerLabel: Choose a worksheet to append to:
